my_thoughts: The comparison_contrast mechanism with META_03 feels like challenging_pedagogical_inconsistency is being met with a specific geometric cut. But what if the geometry itself is what they're resisting? The intellectual_critique, seeking_consistency suggests they're aware of something but can't name it.
accumulated_insight: Initial observation: Student in challenging_pedagogical_inconsistency showing intellectual_critique, seeking_consistency. Beginning pattern tracking.
visible_response:
If you only worship this form, you are wasting your time.
If this form reminds you of your own true nature, then it has done its work, and you can forget it.
